summary: Frontend-only smoke + integration testing for D-Clix Malaysian sports academy app after orange/white+orange/black theme refactor and D-Clix logo branding. All major flows work end-to-end in both light and dark modes. Splash → Login → Home → Profile → all tabs → QR scan modal → Attendance deep-link all function correctly with D-Clix logo and orange gradient theme. The dual theme toggle (login-theme-toggle icon + profile-dark-mode-toggle Switch) correctly flips the entire app to near-black backgrounds with orange accents and light text.

issues: Non-blocking: react-native-web shadow* deprecation warnings in console — should migrate to boxShadow eventually (explicitly flagged as expected in context note).
Non-blocking: Animated useNativeDriver warnings on web (expected for Expo web preview).
Non-blocking: props.pointerEvents deprecation warning after login submit.

action_items: No code fixes required for this iteration — all acceptance criteria from the review request are met.
(Optional polish) Consider adding testID='home-screen' to the Home tab root View for stricter automation (currently relies on fab-qr-scan and Quick Access tiles).
(Optional) Eventually migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow to silence react-native-web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeProvider in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts is clean — uses React.createContext + useMemo; back-compat static `colors`/`shadow` exports preserved as advertised.
Every screen correctly consumes useTheme() and rebuilds StyleSheet via useMemo(createStyles(colors, shadow, mode)), so toggle triggers re-render of all screens consistently.
LOGO_URL is centralized in theme.ts and reused on splash, login brandRow, home header, and Profile virtual-ID card — good DRY.
Login prefills SA-2026-0142 / demo1234 and Sign In correctly router.replace('/(tabs)/home') — no backend call needed (pure mock).
seed_data_creation: None — all data seeded statically in /app/frontend/src/mockData.ts (confirmed in review request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is an Expo Router app served at https://training-portal-126.preview.emergentagent.com. Auto-navigates from splash to /login after ~2.4s; login form is prefilled (SA-2026-0142/demo1234) and Sign In routes to /(tabs)/home. Two theme toggles wired to the same useTheme().toggle: testID='login-theme-toggle' (icon button, top-right of login) and testID='profile-dark-mode-toggle' (Switch inside Profile > Theme card). Toggle state is in-memory only (resets on reload — explicitly accepted per review request). QR FAB has testID='fab-qr-scan'; /qr-scan modal auto-shows success state after ~2.8s. Home tab root does NOT have a 'home-screen' testID — use fab-qr-scan or Quick Access tile text as selectors. Non-blocking shadow*/useNativeDriver/pointerEvents console warnings are expected on web.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found during this iteration.
verified_flows: Splash screen renders D-Clix logo inside animated orange ring with orange glow, auto-navigates to /login after ~2.4s ✅
Login light mode: D-Clix logo + D-CLIX brand, Student/Instructor chips (Student = orange gradient, Instructor = outlined), prefilled SA-2026-0142/demo1234 ✅
login-theme-toggle icon instantly flips whole login screen to orange/black — verified by before/after screenshots ✅
Home Dashboard: orange gradient header with D-Clix logo on right, stats row (87% Attendance / Blue Belt / 82 Fitness), FEES DUE RM 4,800 card, Today's Class card, Quick Access 12-icon grid ✅
Bottom tab bar: orange active icons, center FAB with orange gradient (testID=fab-qr-scan) ✅

Profile screen: orange gradient header, Virtual ID card with D-Clix logo + D-CLIX brand + barcode + QR icon, Theme toggle card (testID=profile-dark-mode-toggle) showing Light Mode/Dark Mode copy with matching subtitle ✅

profile-dark-mode-toggle Switch flips theme app-wide — Home/Training/Schedule/Payments all render dark near-black backgrounds with orange primary accents and light text (verified via screenshots of Payments tab showing RM 4,800 orange gradient card on dark canvas) ✅

QR FAB opens /qr-scan modal with orange laser-scan frame + 'Align the QR within the frame' then auto-transitions to 'Check-in Successful!' with green tick, 'Class: Karate Drills', 'Attendance marked for today' and orange Done button ✅
No red-screen errors, no page errors, no 500s
